ccel.title: NPNF2-08. Basil: Letters and Select Works

source.title: NPNF2-08. Basil: Letters and Select Works
NPNF2-08. Basil: Letters and Select Works

verses.text: “Twice cabbage is death,” says the unkind proverb.
I, however, though I have called for it often, shall die once.
Yes: even though I had never called for it at all!
If you do die anyhow, don’t fear to eat a delicious relish, unjustly reviled by the proverb!
